required_preferences.fact: Spends Thursday evenings having solo downtime at home or catching up on business planning while his wife is busy with after-school tutoring duties

supersedes.fact: Helps wife with grading math papers on Thursday evenings, making it a shared routine

required_preferences.fact: Eats a heart-healthy lunch with vegetables and lean protein, prepared at home or chosen from the healthiest nearby options — no longer limits to sandwiches and will order if it meets dietary needs

supersedes.fact: Eating lunch is limited to homemade sandwiches prepared before opening — never orders from nearby restaurants

required_preferences.fact: Reads local history books at the coffee shop during slow afternoons—never uses e-books
Reviews inventory levels every evening after closing — never waits until morning deliveries arrive
Schedules Sunday family meals as the main weekly sit-down dinner, making it a non-negotiable gathering in light of reduced weekday overlap
Practices daily 15-minute mindfulness or breathing exercises during afternoon breaks at the shop to reduce stress, as recommended by his doctor

persona: A small business owner managing payroll for five employees
